# WCSessionFileTransfer

**Class**

Information about in-progress file transfers.

## Declaration

```swift
class WCSessionFileTransfer
```

## Overview

You do not create instances of this class yourself. When you initiate a file transfer, the system creates a new file transfer object to represent the transferred file. Use that object to get the file information or to cancel the transfer as needed.

To initiate a file transfer operation, call the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/transferFile(_:metadata:)] method of your app’s [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession] object.

## Getting the File Information

- **file**: The file being transferred.

## Managing the File Transfer

- **isTransferring**: A Boolean value indicating whether the file is still being transferred.
- **progress**: An object that tracks the progress of the file transfer.
- **cancel()**: Cancels the file transfer.

## Data Objects

- **WCSessionFile**: Information about a file currently being transferred between an iOS app and WatchKit extension.
- **WCSessionUserInfoTransfer**: Information about in-progress data transfers.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
